title: Artec Studio 17 tutorials 5/10 - Scanning procedure
author: Campanaro, Danilo Marco
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the fifth in a series of 10 video tutorials produced within the activities of the Swedish infrastructure for Digital Archaeology, Swedigarch. This tutorial focuses on aligning multiple scans in Artec Studio 17. It guides you through the process of bringing together different cleaned scans into a single coordinated model using both manual and automatic alignment tools. This step is essential for creating a complete and accurate 3D reconstruction. The dataset used in this tutorial—including an Artec Studio project file, a 3D model in OBJ format, and a PDF with a specific print designed to enhance scan quality—can be downloaded from the first tutorial at  https://zenodo.org/uploads/15149591 .
